_comment: WP-009 — recorded discovery/concierge session (ADR-006; MEA-09 recorded, not a mock). Replayed by RecordedSessionBridge so the concierge read-only round-trip is CI-testable + recorded-observable WITHOUT a live agent. The LIVE concierge answer is the BLOCK-and-hand-to-founder observation. The same stream-json line shapes the chat fixture uses (system/init, stream_event content_block_delta, result/success) — the concierge maps the resulting ChatStreamEvents to ConciergeStreamEvents at the route. Carries no question or reply text that reveals founder data: a generic read-only answer.
